response.justification: Exceptional seniority (Staff engineer, 20 years total experience, 17+ years professional) with demonstrated full-stack mastery, microservices architecture expertise, and directly relevant AI-agent infrastructure experience. Strong match on TypeScript, Node.js, testing, and TDD culture. Primary concern: React not explicitly mentioned (though Ember.js experience demonstrates comparable frontend framework expertise). Minor gaps in specific tooling callouts (Nest.js, Vitest, Playwright) unlikely to be blockers for this caliber.
strengths: Staff-level architect with proven system design at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/sec; Optilyz: pricing optimization across countries) and modern infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Current role at re:cinq explicitly includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generation—directly matches specialized requirement and demonstrates recent, active depth in this area

Strong TypeScript/Node.js fullstack track record across multiple roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE Capital, WatchUp), paired with demonstrated TDD culture and testing expertise (workshops, custom test runner built in D)
concerns: React not explicitly mentioned in roles; primary stack emphasizes React, though Ember.js experience across multiple projects suggests frontend framework competency exists but may require ramp-up
Specific tooling gaps: Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright not called out; testing depth is clear but framework specificity unknown

Job tenure pattern: multiple shorter roles (6 months at NI, 1 year at WatchUp) and recent job change (Feb 2025 to current) raises questions about commitment stability, though current Staff title suggests seniority recognition
